2011-T2-P4-S3.trunk: 全部倒装：Says Dennis Carey: 「…」（科恩/费里高级合伙人丹尼斯·凯里说：…）
structure: 倒装主句：Says Korn/Ferry senior partner Dennis Carey（= Dennis Carey says，因引语提前而全部倒装）
引语：I can't think of a single search …
├ 定语从句〔省略关系词，修饰 search〕：I've done
└ 定语从句〔where，修饰 search〕：where a board has not instructed me to look at sitting CEOs first
2011-T2-P4-S3.logic: Says + 主语 是引语提示语的全部倒装；引语主干 I can't think of a single search；其后 (that) I've done 与 where… 两个定语从句都修饰 search。
notes: Says Dennis Carey 是全部倒装（= Dennis Carey says），因引语提前。
a single search (that) I've done where…：search 后接两个定语从句，第一个省略关系词，第二个由 where 引导。
sitting CEOs 现任 CEO；instruct sb to do 指示某人做。

2011-T2-P1-S4.trunk: S+V：he was talking … with the board of Hartford Financial Services Group（他正与哈特福德金融服务集团的董事会洽谈）
structure: 主句：he was talking for the first time with the board of Hartford Financial Services Group
└ 非限制性定语从句〔which，修饰 the Group/board〕：which named him CEO and chairman on September 29
2011-T2-P1-S4.logic: 主句 he was talking with the board；which 非限制性定语从句补充说明该集团随后的动作（任命他）。
notes: which 非限制性定语从句（带逗号）补充说明 Hartford Financial Services Group。
name sb CEO 任命某人为 CEO（name + 宾语 + 宾补）。
for the first time 首次。

2011-T2-P1-S2.trunk: S+并列谓语：he came right out and said （他直截了当地说…）
structure: 方式状语（Rather than + V-ing）：Rather than cloaking his exit in the usual vague excuses
主句：he came right out and said …（并列谓语 came out / said）
└ 宾语从句（省略 that）：he was leaving 「to pursue my goal of running a company」
└ 不定式作目的状语：to pursue my goal of running a company
2011-T2-P1-S2.logic: Rather than cloaking… 作方式状语（而不是…）；主句并列谓语 came out and said；said 后接省略 that 的宾语从句，其中 to pursue… 表目的。
notes: Rather than + V-ing：而不是…（与主句动作对比）。
came right out and said 直截了当地说出来（并列谓语）。
to pursue my goal of running a company 不定式作目的状语；cloak 掩饰、遮掩。
